seoTitle: Kawana vs Kawl Kawl — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kawana and Kawl Kawl. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Kawana vs Kawl Kawl: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kawana and Kawl Kawl.
heading: Kawana vs Kawl Kawl — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kawana, Queensland and Kawl Kawl, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kawana has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Kawl Kawl (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kawana or Kawl Kawl safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kawana has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Kawl Kawl scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kawana scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Kawl Kawl scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kawana or Kawl Kawl?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kawana has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
